meaning: n.酸,<俚>迷幻药;adj.酸的,讽刺的,刻薄的;"atomicity,consistency,isolation,and durability" 原子性,一致性,不相关性和持久性
examples: Rye is tolerant of poor, acid soils.
Carbolic acid is usually used for cleaning.
Storing large quantities of electricity has long been the domain of 150-year-old lead-acid chemistry.
The ACID properties (atomicity, consistency, isolation, durability) have been drilled into our heads.
